# Word Catalog Audit Report

**Generated by** `scripts/audit-all-words.py` (catalog from `export-words-json.ts`)
**KJV source:** `kjv.pdf`

**Multi-word answers:** 219

## User trigger example (fixed)

Previously: `MIDNIGHT CRY BEHOLD BRIDEGROOM` (missing article; not a KJV quote).
Now: `BEHOLD THE BRIDEGROOM COMETH` (Matthew 25:6, contiguous KJV).
Scripture field: `And at midnight there was a cry made, Behold, the bridegroom cometh; ...`

## What this audit fixed (2026-07-10)

| Area | Before | After |
|---|---|---|
| Expansion answers | Many article-stripped paraphrases | Contiguous KJV phrases (129 string changes) |
| Expansion scripture | Mid-word PDF cuts (`ied, theyâ€¦`), digit-glues (`6And`) | Sentence-snapped snippets; 0 start-lower / 0 digit-glue |
| Core spelling | `RUMORS` (modern) | `RUMOURS` (KJV) |
| Core quote accuracy | e.g. stone/feet/beast/altar paraphrases | Exact KJV wording + matching verses |
| Clue leaks | Full answer in regular clues | 0 full / 0 strong 2-word leaks |
| Seed parity | Risk of drift | Regenerated `supabase/seed_content.sql` from client |
| Tooling | One-off expansion build only | `audit-all-words.py`, `fix-word-accuracy.py`, `export-words-json.ts` |

**Study terms left intentionally** (SDA vocabulary, not claimed as letter-for-letter KJV quotes): Straight Testimony, Investigative Judgment, Sunday Law, Close of Probation, Second Coming, etc. Their **clues and verses** still point to supporting Scripture.

## How to re-run

```bash
npx tsx scripts/export-words-json.ts
python scripts/audit-all-words.py
npx tsx scripts/check-duplicate-words.ts
npx tsx scripts/check-regular-clue-leaks.ts
```
